prompt: A raw, authentic smartphone photo with a Pinterest-inspired aesthetic, captured during golden hour. No CGI, no AI-generated look, and no excessive retouching. Beautiful, healthy, smooth skin with realistic pores and natural skin texture. Shot from an extremely low angle (looking up), with the viewer's gaze directed toward the model and the sky. The woman stands centered in the frame against a rich, deep blue sky filled with massive white cumulus clouds. Natural movement and dynamic body posture, creating a candid, effortlessly cinematic feel.
promptEn: A raw, authentic smartphone photo with a Pinterest-inspired aesthetic, captured during golden hour. No CGI, no AI-generated look, and no excessive retouching. Beautiful, healthy, smooth skin with realistic pores and natural skin texture. Shot from an extremely low angle (looking up), with the viewer's gaze directed toward the model and the sky. The woman stands centered in the frame against a rich, deep blue sky filled with massive white cumulus clouds. Natural movement and dynamic body posture, creating a candid, effortlessly cinematic feel.
promptZh: 一张真实、自然的手机照片，采用 Pinterest 风格美学，拍摄于 黄金时刻。无 CGI，无 AI 生成感，无过度修图。呈现美丽、健康、平滑的肌肤，带有真实的毛孔和自然皮肤纹理。采用 极低角度（仰拍）拍摄，将观众的视线引向模特与天空。女性位于画面中心，背景是深邃的蓝色天空和巨大的积云。自然的动态与灵动的身体姿态，营造出一种随性且极具电影感的氛围。
